self_approve_authority: AMD_LANE01_CTO_AUTO_APPROVE_TECH_NON_CANON §3.1 (bug fix on shipped infra = tech non-canon) + NTS verbatim 'CLAC phải chạy tiếp để fix lỗi cho hoàn chỉnh' 2026-04-29
purpose: Fix Continuity threshold bug in shipped Task 2 heartbeat checker (8+ scheduled runs failing); commit NTS_DECISION packet for INTER_AIER_BRIDGE_CANON v1.1 + LAW_N13 to provide repo-backed authority chain
supersedes: LANE01-INH-CODE-02-HEARTBEAT-7COND (V2 dispatch) — CANCELLED by CLA per R-INHERIT-03

phases.name: Pre-flight + branch
phases.outcome: git status clean; branch fix/LANE01-INH-CODE-02b-heartbeat-failing created from c56b07f; AMD packet 22bfadb (Task 3 Q1-Q4 approval) confirmed in repo

phases.name: Diagnose failing condition
phases.outcome: Root cause identified: Continuity check FAIL with gap > 900s threshold. 7 consecutive scheduled runs (78/72/66/59/235/153 min gaps) failed because GitHub Actions free-tier cron */10 fires at 60-235 min real intervals, far exceeding the 900s (15 min) threshold. State JSON correctly showed status=unhealthy with single FAIL on Continuity. All 6 other conditions OK. Architecture note: LAW_N8 §L8.8 specifies 60s threshold for daemon-style heartbeat (Lane runtime on Vultr) — does not apply to cron-style heartbeat (this).

phases.name: Apply fix
phases.outcome: Bumped CONTINUITY_MAX_GAP_SECONDS = 21600 (6h) in scripts/heartbeat_checker.py with detailed docstring rationale. No redesign — same 7-condition shape, same Python stdlib, same sovereignty-respecting repo-only ledger (R-INTER-AIER-01). Local dry-run: 7/7 PASS, exit 0, status=alive.

phases.name: NTS_DECISION packet
phases.outcome: Authored docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/amendments/approved/NTS_DECISION_2026-04-29_BRIDGE_CANON_v1_1_LAW_N13.md recording NTS verbatim approval 'APPROVE INTER_AIER_BRIDGE_CANON v1.1 + LAW_N13 multi-repo workflow' so future task specs can cite repo-backed authority instead of chat-only claims (Memory Spec V1 §22).

phases.name: Open PR + manual trigger workflow
phases.outcome: PR #9 opened. First on-branch dispatch (run 25095413368) FAILED because workflow had hardcoded ref: main (so it ran main's checker, not branch's). Companion fix: workflow .github/workflows/aier_code_heartbeat.yml updated to ref: ${{ github.ref }} so dispatch on branch tests branch code; auto-commit pushes back to dispatched ref. Re-trigger run 25095463913 SUCCESS — Status: alive 7/7.

phases.name: Self-merge after AC verify
phases.outcome: PR #9 squash-merged at 3e1af63. Required rebase + skip on-branch verification auto-commit (ledger conflict with main's auto-commits while fix branch was open). Branch deleted post-merge.

phases.name: Post-merge stability watch
phases.outcome: Manual dispatch on main (run 25095568456) SUCCESS — Status: alive 7/7. Awaiting next 2 scheduled cron runs to verify (cron */10 fires irregularly on GHA free-tier; will update snapshot when scheduled-run conclusions land).

phases.name: Handoff CLA inbox MSG
phases.outcome: PENDING — handoffs/inbox/Lane_01/MSG-CLAC1-HEARTBEAT-FIX-COMPLETE.json with root cause + fix summary + 2 manual dispatch success + scheduled run verification status

root_cause: Continuity threshold (900s) too tight for GitHub Actions cron */10 real-world timing (60-235 min observed gaps). Bug introduced in Task 2 v1 implementation 2026-04-28.
fix: Bump CONTINUITY_MAX_GAP_SECONDS to 21600 (6h) + workflow ref tweak to enable branch-based testing.

verification_runs.reason: ran main's pre-fix checker due to ref: main hardcode — exposed companion workflow bug; fix included in same PR

scheduled_runs_post_merge: PENDING (will append on next cron fires; expected within 30-60 min based on GHA observed cadence)
follow_ups_for_CLA: Task 4 LANE01-INH-CODE-04-BUILD-L1-INGEST still HALT — needs Supabase env vars + Mgmt API runner authoring + PR #8 (blueprint) merge
PR #8 (blueprint) still OPEN — recommend merge so docs/architecture/BRAIN_BLUEPRINT_AIER_CODE.md reaches main
